brand.name: STRATIQ Access

brand.legalFooter: STRATIQ Access is a commercial division operated by Abraj Al-Anwar for General Trading, General Contracting & Commercial Agencies LLC, Iraq.
brand.legalFooterExtended: STRATIQ Access is a commercial division operated by Abraj Al-Anwar for General Trading, General Contracting & Commercial Agencies LLC, Iraq. All engagements, representation mandates, advisory services, tender advisory support, and commercial coordination activities are subject to written agreement, applicable Iraqi laws, and appropriate confidentiality and non-circumvention protections.
brand.disclosureNotice: Detailed opportunity disclosure is subject to NDA, non-circumvention, and engagement approval.

hero.title: STRATIQ Access
hero.subline: Market Entry Advisory. Tender Advisory. Local Representation.
hero.description: A registered commercial platform giving international companies structured, protected access to Iraq's most strategic markets.

whoWeAre.title: A premium Iraq access platform for international companies.
whoWeAre.body:
STRATIQ Access is built for companies that require more than introductions. We support foreign manufacturers, technology providers, EPC companies, investors, and solution providers with the local insight, commercial structure, and institutional interface required to operate in Iraq.

Our work combines market understanding, tender visibility, local representation, procurement support, and partnership development — delivered through a confidential and professional engagement model.

whatWeDo.title: We help companies move from interest to market position.
whatWeDo.body:
Iraq offers significant opportunities across infrastructure, power, digital transformation, smart metering, telecom, solar, industrial development, and government procurement. But entering the market requires local intelligence, qualified partners, regulatory awareness, and trusted execution channels.

STRATIQ Access helps international companies identify the right opportunities, understand the decision landscape, structure local engagement, and compete with a clear market-entry strategy.

home.servicesTitle: Six disciplines, one structured route into Iraq.
home.sectorsTitle: Where international capability meets Iraqi demand.

why.title: Local intelligence. International standards. Structured access.
why.body:
We understand that international companies need more than a name or a contact. They need a reliable local platform that can assess opportunities, protect commercial interests, support negotiations, and create a structured route into the Iraqi market.

STRATIQ Access is designed around discretion, qualification, and execution.

confidentiality.title: A confidential and structured engagement model.
confidentiality.body: Sensitive opportunities, client contacts, buyer information, pricing intelligence, and partner details are shared only after the appropriate protection framework is in place. This may include NDA, Non-Circumvention Agreement, Service Agreement, Success Fee Agreement, or Representation Mandate.

finalCta.title: Ready to explore Iraq with structure and confidence?
finalCta.body: Contact STRATIQ Access to request a confidential market-access discussion.

engagementSteps.title: Market Review
engagementSteps.body: We assess your company, sector, products, and objectives against Iraq's current market and regulatory landscape.

engagementSteps.title: Opportunity Mapping
engagementSteps.body: We identify relevant market segments, buyers, tenders, projects, and potential partners suited to your capability.

engagementSteps.title: Protection Framework
engagementSteps.body: We put NDA, non-circumvention, and engagement terms in place before any sensitive detail is shared.

engagementSteps.title: Local Execution
engagementSteps.body: We support representation, procurement, documentation, meetings, and tender follow-up on the ground in Iraq.

hero.title: A premium Iraq access platform, built on a registered commercial foundation.
hero.description: STRATIQ Access exists to give international companies a structured, credible, and protected route into the Iraqi market.

overview.title: An institutional interface between international companies and the Iraqi market.
overview.body:
STRATIQ Access was built to answer a specific gap: international companies entering Iraq need more than a local contact — they need a structured platform that can qualify opportunities, coordinate representation, support procurement, and protect their commercial interests throughout the engagement.

We operate as a dedicated commercial division with a registered legal and contracting base in Iraq, giving international partners a credible institutional counterpart rather than an informal intermediary.

accessModel.title: Local insight, delivered through an international-standard process.
accessModel.body:
Every engagement follows a structured model: initial review, opportunity mapping, formal engagement structure, and execution support. Nothing moves forward without a clear mandate and agreement in place.

This discipline is what allows STRATIQ Access to work across sensitive sectors — energy, ICT, government procurement — without compromising the confidentiality of any party involved.

values.title: Discretion
values.body: Sensitive opportunities, buyer relationships, and commercial terms are protected at every stage of engagement.

values.title: Insight
values.body: Decisions are grounded in structured local market and tender insight, not assumption.

values.title: Execution
values.body: Engagements are governed by clear mandates and carried through to a defined outcome.

values.title: Compliance
values.body: All activity operates within Iraqi law under a registered commercial structure.

hero.title: Six disciplines. One structured route into Iraq.
hero.description: Every engagement is scoped, agreed, and governed under a formal mandate — not an informal introduction.

items.title: Market Entry Advisory
items.summary: We help international companies assess Iraq's market potential, identify entry pathways, understand local requirements, and structure a practical market-entry plan.

items.title: Tender Advisory
items.summary: We monitor, qualify, and brief clients on relevant public and enterprise tender opportunities across strategic Iraqi sectors.

items.title: Local Representation
items.summary: We support selected international companies as their Iraq-facing commercial and coordination representative, subject to formal mandate and agreement.

items.title: Procurement & Sourcing Support
items.summary: We assist with local sourcing, supplier coordination, price intelligence, documentation support, and procurement follow-up.

items.title: Partnership & JV Development
items.summary: We identify and support structured partnerships, joint ventures, agency models, and local execution relationships.

items.title: Delegation & Meeting Support
items.summary: We coordinate business visits, meeting agendas, local introductions, translation support, and delegation logistics.

cta.title: Not sure which service fits your objective?
cta.body: Tell us about your company and we will recommend the right engagement structure.

items.title: Smart Metering, AMI, HES & MDM Systems

hero.title: How international companies enter the Iraqi market.
hero.description: A structured route from first contact to qualified local presence.

sections.title: Local Partner Models
sections.body: Iraq's public and enterprise procurement environment favors companies with a credible, structured local presence. We help you evaluate representation, agency, and joint-venture models against your sector and risk profile.

sections.title: Tender Registration Support
sections.body: We support the documentation, vendor registration, and qualification steps required to participate in Iraqi public and enterprise tenders.

sections.title: Public / Private Opportunity Mapping
sections.body: We map relevant buyers, projects, and procurement cycles across government, state-owned enterprises, and private sector demand.

sections.title: Representation Safeguards
sections.body: Every representation engagement is governed by a formal mandate that defines scope, exclusivity, duration, and commercial terms.

sections.title: NDA & Non-Circumvention Policy
sections.body: Buyer identities, tender documents, and pricing intelligence are protected under NDA and Non-Circumvention Agreements before detailed disclosure.

cta.title: Planning to enter the Iraqi market?
cta.body: Request a confidential review of the right entry model for your company.

hero.title: Qualified visibility into Iraq's tender landscape.
hero.description: We monitor, qualify, and brief clients on opportunities that match their sector and capability — not a raw, unfiltered feed.

sections.title: Tender Monitoring
sections.body: Continuous tracking of public and enterprise tender announcements across strategic sectors.

sections.title: Opportunity Qualification
sections.body: Each opportunity is screened against buyer credibility, scope, timeline, and fit before it reaches a client.

sections.title: Buyer & Sector Mapping
sections.body: Structured intelligence on procuring entities, decision processes, and sector-specific demand patterns.

sections.title: Competitor & Pricing Analysis
sections.body: Market-level context to help clients position technically and commercially.

sections.title: Bid Support Coordination
sections.body: Coordination support through the bid lifecycle, from qualification to submission follow-up.

sections.title: Confidential Opportunity Briefings
sections.body: Detailed briefings delivered to qualified, engaged clients under the appropriate protection framework.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.body1: STRATIQ Access, a commercial division operated by Abraj Al-Anwar for General Trading, General Contracting & Commercial Agencies LLC, Iraq, collects the information submitted through this website's inquiry, contact, and access-request forms solely to evaluate and respond to your request.
privacy.body2: Information you provide — company name, contact details, sector, and message content — is stored securely and accessible only to authorized STRATIQ Access personnel. We do not sell or share your information with third parties outside the scope of the engagement you request.
privacy.body3Before: Sensitive commercial information disclosed to us during an engagement is handled under the confidentiality and non-circumvention terms described on our
privacy.body4: To request access to, correction of, or deletion of your data, contact

terms.title: Terms of Use
terms.body1: Use of this website does not, by itself, create a representation, advisory, or partnership relationship with STRATIQ Access. Such relationships are formed only through a signed mandate or agreement, as described under our engagement model.
terms.body2: Opportunity listings, market intelligence, and sector information published on this site are provided for general orientation only and do not constitute a binding offer, guarantee of award, or legal or financial advice.
terms.body3: All content on this website is the property of STRATIQ Access / Abraj Al-Anwar unless otherwise noted, and may not be reproduced without written permission.

confidentiality.title: Confidentiality & Protection
confidentiality.intro: STRATIQ Access operates with a confidential and structured engagement model.

items.title: NDA Requirement
items.body: Sensitive opportunities, buyer identities, and pricing intelligence require a signed Non-Disclosure Agreement before detailed disclosure.

items.title: Non-Circumvention Protection
items.body: Clients and partners engaged through STRATIQ Access agree not to bypass STRATIQ Access in dealings introduced through the platform.

items.title: Representation Mandate
items.body: Local representation is governed by a formal, time-bound mandate defining scope, exclusivity, and commercial terms.

hero.title: Paid tender advisory and market-entry reports.
hero.description: In-depth briefings available for purchase, released after payment or manual approval.
